run_summary.summary: Scanned 8 emails across 3 threads. Flexsteel campaign is moving via Popfly platform, but Kenny hit a wall — Popfly is requiring managerial access to Liz's Instagram business account before he can submit the campaign application. Kenny pushed back, sent screenshots to Ian (Popfly) today, and is waiting on their dev team to clarify or fix. Ian also still needs a confirmed time for the Steinhafels retail store visit. Timing note: the reveal shoot is targeting May 13/14 due to Kenny's dad's health situation; third video is due end of May per agreement. Separately, the Linkind SP6 Solar Pathway Lights deal is in content concept limbo — Liz submitted a 'Top 3 Tips' concept, brand asked for a screen time breakdown on Apr 20, and Liz responded the same day confirming lights will be the feature (50%+ screen time). Waiting on concept approval before she can film. Also: xTool reached out with a $10K in-kind laser machine offer — Liz politely declined in favor of paid collabs only.

suggestions.message: Kenny is waiting on Ian (Popfly) to resolve the Instagram business account managerial access requirement. If you don't hear back by Wednesday, nudge Ian directly. Also — Ian still needs your planned time for the Steinhafels Downers Grove visit so the store can prepare.

You addressed the brand's screen time concern on Apr 20 — they should have everything they need to approve the concept. If no answer by Wed Apr 23, worth following up with the agency so you can get to filming.

deals.next_action: Wait for Ian (Popfly) to resolve Instagram business account access requirement
deals.notes: [Apr 21]: Kenny sent screenshots to Ian Saunders at Popfly (ian@popfly.com) showing the Instagram business account managerial access prompt that's blocking campaign application. Ian checking with dev team. Note: Ian also needs confirmed retail store visit time — Steinhafels Downers Grove, IL. Reveal shoot targeting May 13/14 (Kenny's dad recovering from pacemaker replacement + follow-up in Naples FL). Third video due end of May per agreement.
